svg.title: KRWSA Website Structure

g.text: Navbar — logo · nav links · language toggle (English / Malayalam)
Background image of Kerala water body · tagline · "Know More" button
Stats bar (Bootstrap cards in a row)
Districts covered · Households connected · Projects completed · Staff count
